name: Jane Doe
title: Senior Product Manager

career_arc.achievement: Led AI product launch reaching 1M users

education: Stanford University, MBA | UC Berkeley, BS Computer Science

credibility.short: 8 years building AI and fintech products at scale
credibility.medium: PM with 8 years of experience building AI and fintech products, from 0-to-1 launches to scaling platforms to millions of users
credibility.long: Over the past 8 years, I have built and scaled products across AI, fintech, and enterprise SaaS. At TechCorp, I led the AI product launch that reached 1M users in 6 months. At StartupCo, I built the payment platform from scratch to $200M in annual volume. I bring a metrics-first approach to product strategy, grounded in strong technical fundamentals and a bias for shipping.

quantified_impact: $500M+ in documented business impact across AI and fintech products
